nasb.text: All are not apostles, are they? All are not prophets, are they? All are not teachers, are they? All are not workers of miracles, are they?

esv.text: Are all apostles? Are all prophets? Are all teachers? Do all work miracles?

cnv.text: 難道都是使徒嗎？都是先知嗎？都是教師嗎？都是行神蹟的嗎？

ccb.text: 岂是都做使徒吗？都做先知吗？都做教师吗？都行神迹吗？

csbs.text: 难道都是使徒吗？都是做先知传道的吗？ 都是教师吗？都是有大能的吗？
